content.problemStatement:
Given an array AAA of NNN integers. Consider an arbitrary **non negative** integer XXX(initially, **score is zero**).

We will **sequentially** perform the following operation for indices 1,2,3,....N:1,2,3,....N:1,2,3,....N:

For ithi^{th}ith operation,


If X=AiX = A_iX=Ai‚Äč then add XXX to scorescorescore.
Otherwise, assign X:=X‚äēAiX := X \oplus A_iX:=X‚äēAi‚Äč.
Where ‚äē\oplus‚äē is bitwise **XOR** operation.

**Note:** when XXX matches AiA_iAi‚Äč during ithi^{th}ith operation, you are not updating XXX.

You are tasked to print the **maximum** achievable scorescorescore after doing NNN operations by choosing optimal **initial value** of integer XXX.


Input Format
The first line contains single integer TTT ‚ąí-‚ąí the number of testcases. For each testcase,



the first line contains a single integer NNN ‚ąí-‚ąí the size of the array AAA.
the second line contains NNN space-separated integers, A1,A2,‚čĮ‚ÄČ,ANA_1, A_2, \cdots, A_NA1‚Äč,A2‚Äč,‚čĮ,AN‚Äč ‚ąí-‚ąí the elements of array AAA.


Output Format
For each testcase, print a single line containing a single integer ‚ąí-‚ąí maximum possible scorescorescore.
constraints: The sum of NNN over all testcases doesn't exceed 2‚čÖ1052\cdot 10^52‚čÖ105

sampleTestCases.explanation:
Explanation:
Testcase 1:


If initial State: X=0X = 0X=0 and score =0=0=0,

At i=1i = 1i=1:  Since X‚Č†1X \neq 1XÓÄ†=1, update X‚ÜíX‚äēA1=0‚äē1=1X \to X \oplus A_1 = 0 \oplus 1 = 1X‚ÜíX‚äēA1‚Äč=0‚äē1=1 and score is still zero.
At i=2i = 2i=2:  Again X‚Č†2X \neq 2XÓÄ†=2, update X‚ÜíX‚äēA2=1‚äē2=3X \to X \oplus A_2 = 1 \oplus 2 = 3X‚ÜíX‚äēA2‚Äč=1‚äē2=3 and score is still zero.
Final Score: 000



If initial State: X=3X = 3X=3 and score =0=0=0,

At i=1i = 1i=1:  Since X‚Č†1X \neq 1XÓÄ†=1, update X‚ÜíX‚äēA1=3‚äē1=2X \to X \oplus A_1 = 3 \oplus 1 = 2X‚ÜíX‚äēA1‚Äč=3‚äē1=2 and score is still zero.
At i=2i = 2i=2:  Now, X=2X = 2X=2, so add XXX to the score and XXX is not updated.
Final Score: 222 (Maximum possible score).



Testcase 2:

If initial State: X=1X = 1X=1 and score =0=0=0,

At i=1,2,3i = 1, 2, 3i=1,2,3:   Since X=1X = 1X=1 and X=AiX = A_iX=Ai‚Äč throughout, no update in XXX is performed, and 111 is added to score every time.
Final Score: 333 (Maximum possible score).
